pi_items.source: setup_opencad.sh line 222: User creation SQL statement creates James Rodriguez with this email
setup_opencad.sh line 222: User creation SQL statement inserts user with name 'James Rodriguez'
setup_opencad.sh line 218: Admin user creation SQL statement, and line 360 confirms 'Login credentials: admin@opencad.local'

task.json description specifies suspension reason as 'Misuse of dispatch system - repeated false calls' which contains all three keywords. verifier.py checks for these keywords in the suspend_reason field (lines 22, 71-74)

export_result.sh line 15 comment: 'approved=1 is active, approved=2 is suspended, approved=0 is pending'. verifier.py line 60-61 expects status '2' for full suspension points (35 pts). This is the OpenCAD user approval status value

privileged_info_summary: All user data verified as synthetic and locally created: James Rodriguez (email: james.rodriguez@opencad.local, identifier: 4B-22) is created in Docker with pending approval status. Admin user (email: admin@opencad.local, identifier: 1A-01, password: Admin123!) is created with full admin privileges. Account suspension requires changing the 'approved' field to '2' with a reason containing keywords 'misuse', 'dispatch', or 'false calls'. The suspension reason is stored in the suspend_reason database field.
